title: 3D Scanner Machine using Arduino
description: Low-cost 3D scanner using NEMA17 stepper turntable, VL53L1X TOF sensor, Arduino Uno data acquisition, and Python point-cloud processing to reconstruct object geometry as PLY/STL files.
objective: 1.8° angular resolution; 1 mm radial accuracy; scan 200 mm dia objects; PLY point cloud output; complete scan in < 3 min.
constraints: Arduino Uno; NEMA17 stepper; VL53L1X TOF sensor; USB serial to PC; BOM < ₹2500.
supporting_fact_titles: 3D Scanning — Structured Light and Laser Triangulation
LIDAR Time-of-Flight — Point Cloud Distance Measurement
design_element_titles: Arduino 3D Scanner — Stepper Turntable + TOF Sensor

element_usage_notes.Arduino 3D Scanner — Stepper Turntable +: NEMA17 1.8°/step; VL53L1X TOF (I2C); Arduino serial → Python PLY export.
